The common profession of Alex Beard (as the former chief executive of the Royal Opera House) and Tony Hall, Baron Hall of Birkenhead (as Director-General of the BBC and chairman of the National Gallery) is **leadership in cultural and media institutions**. 

finish(answer="Both are leaders in cultural and media institutions, with Alex Beard serving as CEO of the Royal Opera House and Tony Hall as Director-General of the BBC.")
